ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manuscripts" (
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manuscript */,
  "diff_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each chant or hymn */,
  "melodic_transcription" TEXT /* Melodic transcription of the chant or hymn */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mode */,
  "saeculorum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the saeculorum */,
  "amen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amen */,
  "num_mss" INTEGER /* Number of manuscripts containing the chant or hymn */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the chant or hymn */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Composer of the chant or hymn */,
  "date_composed" TEXT /* Approximate date when the chant or hymn was composed */,
  "date_transcribed" TEXT /* Date when the manuscript was transcribed */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the manuscript is written */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the manuscript */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Physical condition of the manuscript */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the manuscript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manuscript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscripts_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscripts_amen_id FOREIGN KEY ("amen_id") REFERENCES amens ("amen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscripts_saeculorum_id FOREIGN KEY ("saeculorum_id") REFERENCES saeculorums ("saeculorum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin or cultural background of the mode */,
  "historical_period" TEXT /* Historical period during which the mode was prevalent */,
  "examples" TEXT /* Examples of chants or hymns that use this mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "saeculorums" (
  "saeculorum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saeculorum */,
  "saeculorum_name" TEXT /* Name of the saeculorum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the saeculorum */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin or cultural background of the saeculorum */,
  "historical_period" TEXT /* Historical period during which the saeculorum was prevalent */,
  "examples" TEXT /* Examples of chants or hymns that use this saeculorum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("saeculorum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amens" (
  "amen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amen */,
  "amen_name" TEXT /* Name of the amen */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amen */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin or cultural background of the amen */,
  "historical_period" TEXT /* Historical period during which the amen was prevalent */,
  "examples" TEXT /* Examples of chants or hymns that use this amen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the library */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the library */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shelfmarks" (
  "shelfmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shelfmark */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library where the shelfmark is located */,
  "shelfmark" TEXT /* Shelfmark of the manuscript */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the library where the shelfmark is located */,
  "shelf" TEXT /* Specific shelf where the manuscript is stored */,
  "row" TEXT /* Row number in the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelfmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_shelfmarks" (
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript */,
  "shelfmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shelfmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manuscript_id", "shelfmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_modes" (
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manuscript_id", "mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_saeculorums" (
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript */,
  "saeculorum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the saeculorum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manuscript_id", "saeculorum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, student, librarian) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
